customActions.name: Shillelagh Bonk (Driftwood Staff)
customActions.description: Wisdom-based melee. The staff was found at Natural Bridges beach.

customActions.name: Wild Shape: Giant Banana Slug
customActions.description: HP of wild shape form. Slug form has 30ft climb, acid trail, and can fit through any gap.

customActions.name: Produce Flame (anti-vampire)
customActions.description: Ranged spell attack. 1d8 fire + 1d4 radiant vs undead (homebrew).

customFeatures.name: Redwood Bond
customFeatures.description: Can communicate with trees in the UCSC campus forest. They gossip constantly.

customFeatures.name: Wild Shape
customFeatures.description: 2 uses per short rest. Favorite form: banana slug (obviously).

customFeatures.name: Fungal Network
customFeatures.description: Can send messages through mycelium networks under campus. Takes 1d4 minutes. Sometimes the mushrooms editorialize.

notes.personalityTraits: Makes her own kombucha. It's sentient. Refers to all trees by first name.
notes.ideals: Nature doesn't need saving — it needs allies. Also vampires are NOT part of the natural order.
notes.bonds: The ancient redwood behind Porter College whispered the vampire threat to me first.
notes.flaws: Refuses to use processed anything. Once failed a mission because she wouldn't eat trail mix with M&Ms.
notes.backstory: Environmental Studies grad student who discovered actual druidic power during a protest to save a campus meadow from development. The meadow turned out to be a convergence of ley lines. Now she's the only thing standing between UCSC's ecosystem and a coven of vampires nesting in the old lime kilns. Her advisor thinks her thesis on 'Mycorrhizal Communication Networks' is metaphorical. It is not.
notes.freeform: Has a pet banana slug named 'Sammy' who may or may not be her familiar. Won't confirm or deny.
